title: Introduction to Systems Biology
description: A comprehensive lecture introducing the core principles of systems biology, network analysis, and mathematical modelling of biological processes.

title: Gene Regulatory Networks: Structure and Dynamics
description: Explores how transcription factor networks are wired, common network motifs, and what their topology reveals about cellular decision-making.

title: Metabolic Flux Analysis and Constraint-Based Modelling
description: An introduction to flux balance analysis (FBA) for genome-scale metabolic modelling using stoichiometric constraints.
